name: SRT to Markdown Article
one_sentence_value: Convert local SRT subtitle files into clean Markdown article drafts.

source.user_request: 用户输入视频和srt字幕可以输出成为markdown格式的文章
source.design_decision: MVP accepts SRT as the required input and optional video only for local preview or metadata; no ASR, no video transcoding, no upload.

target_users: self-media operators turning captions into article drafts

optional_inputs: local video file for preview, filename, and duration only
core_features: upgrade button to HWH plugin pricing page
out_of_scope_v1: AI rewriting with embedded API keys

reasoning: The required file input is user-selected and can be processed locally.
The extension can ship with minimal permissions.
The output is directly useful as a Markdown file.
Full video-to-text processing should stay out of the MVP.

permissions.notes: Download can use Blob plus an anchor click; user-selected files do not require broad file permissions.

security_rules: extension upgrade URL points to website pricing page
no service role key in extension
no Waffo private key in extension
success page does not locally activate Pro
webhook remains the source of truth

acceptance_criteria: malformed SRT returns useful validation errors
upgrade URL points to HWH pricing page
no secret markers in source or dist
recommended_next_step: Build a local installable prototype before adding it to the public marketplace or configuring payment.
